name: Rimworld Lorebooks
description:
Since Lorebooks cannot be made public yet nor can they be published this post will be used to host the lorebooks I've made so far so yall can use them.

LOREBOOKS:

RIMWORD: Core

RIMWORLD: Biotech

RIMWORLD: Royalty

RIMWORLD: Anomaly

RIMWORLD: Odessy

INSTRUCTIONS ON IMPORTING

Note: This will probably only work on PC/Computer

Step-1: Click one of the links above to see the j.son file containing all the lore then press the button at the top left corner titled "Save" to download the file

Step-2: Go onto Janitor.ai and click on your profile picture, a dropdown menu will appear and click the option titled "Scripts Beta"

Step-3: you'll be brought to the Scripts menu at which point click "Create new Script" and select the "Lorebook" option, give it a title then press "Create" once in the creation menu you'll see a button at the bottom of the screen titled "Import JSON" and select the file you've downloaded.

Step-4: Now you're pretty much done, and you can assign the scripts/lorebooks to your characters as seen on the right hand side, enjoy!

So, feel free to use em however you like, all I ask is you put my name somewhere in the description of the bots you use with the lorebooks so I can find them and use them (yes, if you didn't know everything I make I use personally and I want more Rimworld bots)
creator: runtice
